description:
Your dream gaming setup just dropped 🏎️🔥

Welcome to the Entertainment in tune zone, where gaming, racing, and sound flow together through LG’s display, audio, and AI technologies.

Three 39” LG UltraGear 5K2K OLED GX9 monitors create a 1500R panoramic racing setup, powered by AI upscaling and AI scene optimization for immersive, lifelike motion.

Nearby, LG xboom Studio brings sound and creativity to life—from AI-powered FYI sessions with will.i.am to the full xboom lineup, evolving with your taste.

Discover how LG’s entertainment experience stays in tune—across screens, sound, and space. 🎧🎶

#LGCES2026 #LifesGood #EntertainmentInTune #InnovationInTuneWithYou #CES2026

Innovation, collaboration, and next-gen solutions took center stage at Innofest 2026. From bold ideas to future-ready technology, the event brought together visionaries, partners, and innovators shaping smarter solutions for tomorrow.
#LifesGood #LG #LGinnofest2026

Because great visuals deserve powerful sound.​
Elevate your movie nights.​

Discover more here https://www.lg.com/eastafrica​

#LGSoundbar #LifesGood #LGEastAfrica​

You did her justice. What an inspirational woman 😍

description:
Some love grows slowly, over time.​
From first homes to family spaces, from tiny handprints to walls that carry years of memories.​
For generations, Basco Paints has been part of these milestones — trusted by families to protect, beautify, and grow with their homes.​
Walls that witness change.​
Walls that hold stories.​
Walls that grow with your family for 50 years.​

#BascoPaints #DuracoatAskTheExperts #WallsThatSpeakLove​

description:
Honouring Phoebe Asiyo, the woman who I chose to represent the 1990s in this series celebrating Kenyan women who shaped the last five decades💪🏾 Created in celebration of Basco paints’ 50 year anniversary ✨🌟

A politician, activist, and feminist, Phoebe Asiyo spent much of her life pushing for women to have a voice in leadership. She challenged cultural barriers and fought for greater representation of women in Kenyan politics💁🏽‍♀️

This portrait is also a small tribute to her life and legacy🙏🏽
Rest in peace, Mama Phoebe🕊️

latest_comments.comments: This is so beautiful. I am currently reading her auto biography " It Can Be Done"
🔥🔥🔥 loving the brush strokes that are creating this amazing work❤️❤️ !
You are a gifted artist,keep shining ❤️

description:
Happy international women’s month🌟

Started a new portrait of Muthoni Likimani as part of a special series with Basco Paints celebrating 50 years and the Kenyan women who shaped each decade💪🏾 In the 1980s, Muthoni Likimani used her writing to preserve stories, especially the voices of Kenyan women and the people who helped shape this country. 

Honoured to paint her story.

@bascopaints

#internationalwomensday #muthonilikimani #kenyanwomen #womeninhistory #kenyanart

THE LORD GOD ALMIGHTY IS MY AND YOUR REFUGE AND STRENGTH , an ever- present Help in trouble. Therefore,you don't need to be afraid of anything--not even cataclysmic circumstances.  As you grow closer to the Lord,He opens your eyes to see more and more of His Presence all around you. Things that most people hardly notice,like shifting shades of sunlights,fill you with heart bursting Joy. You have eyes that see and ears that hear,so proclaim His abiding Presence in the world.

description:
The DuraCoat Expert Training Programme by Basco Paints is a transformative, three-day intensive experience. It’s purpose-built to refine your skill set, elevate your professional standards and shape you into one of the industry’s true experts. You’ll gain the confidence to deliver exceptional, lasting results on challenging creative spaces just like at Kreators Afrika!
Want to go from pro to expert? Master your craftsmanship with our DuraCoat Expert Training Programme. Refine your craft. Build confidence and get certified today! Call our Duracoat Helpline: 0800 221 331.

Love doesn’t always announce itself.​
Sometimes, it’s in quiet mornings, shared meals, laughter drifting through the room, or the comfort of simply being home.​

These are the moments that live with us every day  and for 50 years, Basco Paints has been there, colouring the walls that hold them all.​

Because beautiful moments deserve beautiful walls.​
And love lives on your walls, every single day.​

#BascoPaints #DuracoatAskTheExperts #WallsThatSpeakLove​
#Basco50Years #ValentinesDay

Empowering women is key to building stronger industries and communities.
For 22 years, Zarina Khan has been part of the growth journey at Basco Paints, demonstrating that with opportunity, support and dedication, women can excel in any field.
Her story reminds us that when women rise, they uplift the next generation.
Happy International Women’s Day!
#BascoPaints #InternationalWomensDay #GiveToGain #WomenInConstructionSector
